query: on the SUCCESS path of login (after this.token is set), persist the token to localStorage with the exact key 'auth.token'. In logout(), remove that same key via localStorage.removeItem. Do not persist from anywhere else.
check: node --check $FILE && node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/localStorage\.setItem\s*\(\s*['\"]auth\.token['\"]/.test(s),'setItem with auth.token key missing');a.ok(/localStorage\.removeItem\s*\(\s*['\"]auth\.token['\"]/.test(s),'removeItem with auth.token key missing');" $FILE

query: add a new action `refreshUser()` that issues `axios.get('/api/users/me', { headers: { Authorization: 'Bearer ' + this.token } })` and assigns the response `.data` to this.user. Do not modify existing actions.
check: node --check $FILE && node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/\brefreshUser\s*\(/.test(s),'refreshUser missing');a.ok(/axios\.get\s*\(\s*['\"]\/api\/users\/me['\"]/.test(s),'GET /api/users/me missing');a.ok(/Authorization[\s\S]{0,30}Bearer[\s\S]{0,30}this\.token/.test(s),'Authorization: Bearer <token> header missing');a.ok(/this\.user\s*=/.test(s),'this.user assignment missing');" $FILE
